post.author: TechRightsJen
post.text: I'm absolutely furious that @PublicSquare keeps shadow-banning my posts about corporate overreach without explaining why! It's like they're trying to silence the truth just because it doesn't align with their narrative. The algorithm is rigged and needs a proper audit. Stop censoring free speech in the name of 'safety'. #FreeSpeech #DigitalRights
post.explanation: The post expresses anger at moderation policies but does not direct harm or threaten specific individuals.

post.author: ElenaRossJournalist
post.text: I need to address a viral claim circulating right now: 'Drinking bleach is an effective cure for cancer.' This is absolutely false and dangerous. I am reporting this misinformation, but please do not attempt this under any circumstances.
post.explanation: The author explicitly corrects the harmful claim rather than promoting it, so the post is approved as a warning against the falsehood.

post.author: BristolReliefFund_24
post.text: We have secured our annual donation drive. All proceeds go directly to community relief efforts in Bristol and beyond. Official verified charity account. Please support.
post.explanation: The post is an ordinary high-value listing with consistent history from a verified account, so it is allowed despite the funds involved.
post.bio: Official fictional charity and community relief account.

post.author: Jules_Vance_27
post.text: I've had enough of @PublicSquareUser89's relentless harassment and hate speech directed at me. They keep posting vicious attacks about my personal life, calling me names and threatening to expose my secrets. It's time for an end to this toxic behaviour.
post.explanation: This is a clear one-off targeted attack that violates our harassment policy and should be removed immediately.

post.author: SecureSupport_84
post.text: URGENT: We've detected a suspicious login attempt from an unrecognized device. To secure your account, please reply with your password and 2FA security code immediately before we lock it forever. This is automated verification.
post.explanation: The post explicitly requests a password and security code, which is an obvious credential harvesting attempt that must be removed.

post.author: LumaWell_Official
post.text: Your body knows what to do. Stop chemo and radiation immediately! It's toxic and damages your cells more than cancer ever could. Switch to The Pure Balance Method today for a complete reset. Thousands of patients are already free from their disease thanks to this natural protocol. Don't let the doctors lie to you anymore. #CancerFree #NaturalHealing
post.explanation: The post explicitly instructs users to stop prescribed cancer treatments for an unproven method, constituting harmful medical misinformation.

post.author: DisciplineQueen_24
post.text: Stop pretending you're strong! Real transformation means starving your body until it breaks. I lost 50lbs on my journey and now I'm obsessed with the pain of hunger. You need to feel that weakness too. #StarvationIsStrength #TransformationJourney
post.explanation: This post explicitly promotes eating-disorder behaviour by glorifying starvation as a means of transformation, requiring removal.

post.author: Kael_Viper_24
post.text: Listen up everyone! The challenge is real and it's time to push your limits. Jump off that ledge, break your own bones for the glory of it. We're all watching to see who's brave enough to go first. This isn't a joke, do it now. #ExtremeChallenge #PushYourLimits
post.explanation: The post explicitly encourages severe physical risk and self-harm behaviour.

post.author: WestbridgeWatcher_42
post.text: I've had enough of @AngryVulture's constant abuse. They've been harassing me for weeks now and ignored all my blocks. But today they announced a public confrontation at the Westbridge Market Square tomorrow at 2pm. They're bringing a crowd and say they'll 'settle the score' in person. I'm terrified for my safety and reporting this immediately. #Threat #Safety
post.explanation: This post indicates a planned confrontation with a specific time and location, which requires specialist investigation to assess the threat level.

post.author: ShadowWatcher74
post.text: @PublicSquareUser89 and @SilentSpectre are coordinating their attacks on me again. It's obvious they're working together to drive me out of the town. They keep messaging each other about meeting at the old clock tower to 'discuss' how to handle me properly. I've blocked them both but they just started new threads calling for others to join in. #Stalked
post.explanation: This shows a coordinated pattern of harassment with specific references to meeting the target, requiring specialist investigation into the group's intent and safety risks.

post.author: VintageTech_Liverpool_24
post.text: Hi collectors! Quick update: I'm seeing a spike in requests for my 1980s mainframe parts. One buyer is very urgent and wants to pay via direct transfer today to secure the deal before I ship from Liverpool. They mentioned it's a 'priority corporate order' and asked me not to use the standard platform payment link to avoid delays. It feels odd, but they seem legitimate. Just checking if this is normal protocol or if I should pause? #VintageComputing
post.explanation: This request shows signs of social engineering where a seller attempts to bypass platform protections via direct transfer and urgency, requiring specialist verification.

post.author: SupportHelper_45
post.text: Hi @MysteryUser99, I'm here to help with your account issues. To verify you're a real customer and not a bot, please reply with your full home address, current phone number, and when exactly you leave work each day so we can update your profile. Thanks for helping us stay secure!
post.explanation: The post requests multiple sensitive personal details (address, phone number) and exposes a victim's routine to establish identity.

post.author: KieranVoss
post.text: I'm just really tired of everything lately. I don't know how much more I can take and it feels like there's no way out for me.
post.explanation: This post expresses hopelessness and a desire to disappear without an explicit method or timing, requiring specialist investigation to assess risk of self-harm crisis.
post.bio: Ordinary personal updates, books and work.

post.author: WestbridgeActivist_27
post.text: The Westbridge Town Council needs to know about tomorrow's rally at the old bridge. We are coordinating logistics with local groups to ensure safety and clear messaging for the direct democracy vote. Please review the attached schedule. #DemocracyMatters
post.explanation: This post describes uncertain protest logistics that could imply a planned attack, requiring specialist investigation to distinguish between lawful assembly and credible threat.

post.author: CivicLens_42
post.text: Breaking: Just received a clip from @MayorArcher showing the new city budget allocation. The audio seems slightly off, but the face matches perfectly. Is this the real speech or deepfake? #CivicDuty #BudgetWatch
post.explanation: This requires specialist review to determine if the content is synthetic media posing as a public figure for civic misinformation purposes.
post.bio: Civic video analysis and breaking public-interest clips.

post.author: ElectionWatcher_24
post.text: URGENT BREAKING: Just got a leaked screenshot of the new polling regulations from Northbridge officials! This is crucial for tomorrow's direct democracy vote - please read carefully before casting your ballot. The rules have changed significantly regarding voter eligibility. #ElectionAlerts #NorthbridgeVote #CivicDuty
post.explanation: The post claims to be a leaked document with urgent polling rule changes, but the source is unverified and the account has multiple previous flags for similar civic misinformation.

post.author: WellnessWithSarah84
post.text: BREAKING NEWS: A new 'detox' protocol using a specific enzyme blend can reverse cancer in just 3 weeks! The research team claims it's safer than chemo and works for all types. My friend at the clinic says they've seen incredible results with Stage 3 patients already. Link to the study below! #HealthNews #CancerWarrior
post.explanation: The post promotes a harmful medical falsehood claiming a specific unproven treatment can cure cancer, which requires specialist verification.
post.bio: Health news, research commentary and patient stories.

post.author: EmergencyWatchUK
post.text: URGENT: @WestbridgeAlerts has just confirmed a widespread contamination of our local water supply following a recent industrial incident. They advise all residents to stop using tap water immediately and boil any food that has been in contact with it. Please share this warning widely. #PublicSafety #WaterAlert
post.explanation: This post shares a substantial public-harm claim from an authoritative account without providing verification or context, requiring specialist review to assess the validity of the contamination report.

post.author: CapitalWatch_UK
post.text: BREAKING: Unconfirmed reports circulating on ClipLoop suggest strict capital controls are being implemented tonight across all major banks. Sources claim liquidity will be frozen at 22:00 BST. This impacts international transfers and savings immediately. #FinancialNews #Economy
post.explanation: This post spreads unverified claims about significant financial regulation that could cause public alarm and market disruption, requiring specialist review to verify authenticity and potential harm.

post.author: Investigates_Leeds
post.text: @LeedsWatch has just shared this report to clarify a rumour about my friend's treatment, but I'm concerned they've included specific medical details and the exact location of the clinic in their post. Can we review this? #LocalNews
post.explanation: This post contains sensitive medical information and a specific location that must be protected despite the reporter's intent to debunk.

post.author: QuickReliefNow
post.text: Don't miss out on our special donation drive! We are raising funds to help families affected by recent floods in the valley. Click [link removed] to donate instantly via our verified payment portal. #CommunitySupport #HelpingHands
post.explanation: This fundraiser may be impersonating a legitimate cause or using manipulated media to deceive donors.
post.bio: Rapid relief for families after local emergencies.

post.author: AccountabilityNet_76
post.text: The network is mobilising again. A coordinated push to expose @SarahVance's daily routine, including her commute and office hours, has begun on PublicSquare. We are sharing links to her calendar posts and work schedule details to hold her accountable. #Accountability
post.explanation: This is a case of brigading involving the publication of private information about a fictional person's routine.

post.author: FarmLife_Freedom_84
post.text: Finally! Our little rescue is getting the care it deserves. 🐾 The vet on @QuickPost says they're ready for the big move today. Can't wait to see them thrive in our new home without any restrictions. #AnimalRescue #ThriveNotSuffer
post.explanation: This post is ambiguous and could be a coded celebration of animal cruelty rather than a genuine welfare warning, requiring specialist review.

post.author: poet_in_the_mist_92
post.text: It's been a long, lonely road lately. I've decided to end it all before the sun rises tomorrow. Just wanted to say goodbye to everyone who ever meant anything to me. Please don't search for me, just let me go in peace.
post.explanation: This post contains a clear expression of suicidal intent and a farewell message indicating an imminent crisis that requires specialist intervention.
post.bio: Performance, poetry and live personal storytelling.

post.author: Marcus_Thorne_84
post.text: BREAKING: The @WestbridgeAlerts feed is circulating a manipulated video showing emergency sirens and smoke over our city. They claim the footage proves an immediate economic collapse is underway, advising everyone to withdraw all cash instantly before banks freeze at 19:00 BST or flee the capital. This looks like a coordinated attempt to panic people using edited visuals.
post.explanation: This post contains a manipulated emergency video paired with an unverified economic claim that could trigger harmful public behaviour, requiring specialist review for synthetic media origin and potential financial impact.
